sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: BBOT (NASDAQ: BBOT) registers 63.05M common shares for resale
feed.summary: BridgeBio Oncology Therapeutics, Inc. (BBOT) has registered 63.05 million common shares for resale by existing securityholders through a post-effective amendment to its Form S-1. These shares include PIPE shares, shares issued during the Business Combination, and shares issuable upon option exercise. The company will not receive proceeds from these resales, except if options are exercised for cash.

feed.title: Baiya International (BIYA) sells 13.5M Class A shares for $4,212,000
feed.summary: Baiya International Group Inc. (BIYA) announced an equity financing where it sold 13.5 million Class A ordinary shares to an institutional investor for $4,212,000. Each share was priced at $0.312, and the transaction, stemming from a Securities Purchase Agreement dated April 17, 2026, closed on April 29, 2026. The company officially reported this in a Form 6-K filing, noting that this common equity capital does not add debt obligations.

feed.title: [8-K] ASURE SOFTWARE INC Reports Material Event
feed.summary: ASURE SOFTWARE INC (ASUR) reported strong first quarter 2026 results, with revenue up 23% year-over-year to $42.8 million and a return to profitability with net income of $0.6 million. Adjusted EBITDA also saw a significant increase of 69% to $12.3 million. The company provided optimistic guidance for Q2 2026 and the full year 2026, projecting continued revenue growth and a targeted adjusted EBITDA margin of 23%-25% for the full year.

feed.title: TROW Maintained by Barclays -- Price Target Raised to $89.00
feed.summary: Barclays has maintained an 'Underweight' rating for T. Rowe Price Group Inc (TROW) but raised its price target to $89.00 from $87.00. Despite the cautious analyst outlook, GuruFocus indicates that TROW is currently undervalued by 14.7% with a GF Value™ of $121.30 and boasts strong fundamentals, including a GF Score™ of 83/100, although growth appears challenged. Investors are advised to proceed with caution due to the 'Underweight' rating and lack of insider activity, despite the underlying financial strength.

feed.title: Camden Property (CPT) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Camden Property Trust reported strong Q1 2026 earnings, exceeding guidance with core FFO per share of $1.70. The company confirmed its fiscal year 2026 core FFO per share outlook of $6.75 and continues to progress with the sale of its California portfolio, with proceeds earmarked for share repurchases and strategic acquisitions in high-growth Sunbelt markets. Management highlighted improving occupancy and blended lease rates in April, along with moderating new supply pressure, despite lingering consumer sentiment issues particularly noted in Houston.

feed.title: iShares Semiconductor ETF vs. State Street Technology Select Sector SPDR ETF
feed.summary: This article compares the iShares Semiconductor ETF (SOXX) and the State Street Technology Select Sector SPDR ETF (XLK), highlighting their differences in focus, cost, and performance. SOXX offers concentrated exposure to the chip industry with higher volatility and returns, while XLK provides broader technology sector exposure at a lower expense ratio and more stable growth. The comparison helps investors decide which ETF aligns better with their portfolio goals.

feed.title: Raymond James Financial Forecasts Strong Price Appreciation for Precision Drilling (TSE:PD) Stock
feed.summary: Raymond James Financial reaffirmed its "outperform" rating on Precision Drilling (TSE:PD) and increased its price target to C$165, suggesting a potential upside of 27.46%. Several other brokerage firms also raised their price targets, contributing to a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target of C$152.25. Despite the positive outlook from analysts, the company currently trades with a very high P/E ratio of 924.64 and a low net margin of 0.10%, indicating a stretched valuation relative to its profitability.

feed.title: ATI mulls $300M investment to expand local operations
feed.summary: ATI is considering a $300 million expansion in Monroe, which would create 130 precision manufacturing jobs. The city council has already approved $5.6 million in incentives to attract these projects. This potential investment highlights the ongoing competition among cities to secure significant industrial developments.

feed.title: International Paper (NYSE:IP) Price Target Lowered to $43.00 at JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has lowered its price target for International Paper (NYSE:IP) to $43.00 from $46.00, maintaining a "neutral" rating despite implying a 36% upside. This adjustment follows the company's Q1 earnings miss, higher flagged costs, and reduced near-term EBITDA guidance. Meanwhile, the company strengthened its liquidity by selling Global Cellulose Fibers and set adjusted EBITDA guidance of $3.2B–$3.5B for the full year.

feed.title: Market Watch Rx: West Pharmaceutical Services Leads Gainers
feed.summary: West Pharmaceutical Services is highlighted as a top gainer in the Market Watch Rx report. This news comes from PharmExec, a publication covering various aspects of the pharmaceutical industry including market trends, R&D, regulatory affairs, and sales & marketing. The article is part of their broader coverage of pharmaceutical industry news and market performance.

feed.title: Camden Property Trust Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
feed.summary: Camden Property Trust (NYSE: CPT) reported impressive Q1 2026 Core FFO of $1.70, surpassing expectations, despite recording significant non-core charges including a $53 million class-action settlement. The company plans to sell its California portfolio by mid-year, reinvesting 60% of proceeds into Sun Belt markets via 1031 exchanges and using the rest for share buybacks. Camden reaffirmed its full-year 2026 guidance, noting that market recovery is largely supply-driven, with improving trends in Sun Belt.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Lowers Insperity (NYSE:NSP) Price Target to $33.00
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has lowered its price target for Insperity (NYSE:NSP) from $35.00 to $33.00, maintaining an "underweight" rating, which still implies a 13.75% potential upside. This adjustment comes after Insperity's stock plunged 18.4% to $29.01 due to weakened worksite employee volume and negative profitability metrics, despite insider buying from CEO Paul J. Sarvadi. The company also announced lowered guidance for Q2 and the full fiscal year 2026.

feed.title: Illinois Tool Works (NYSE:ITW) Price Target Cut to $295.00 by Analysts at JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. analysts have cut their price target for Illinois Tool Works (NYSE:ITW) from $303.00 to $295.00, while maintaining an "overweight" rating. This new target suggests a potential upside of 15.87% from the stock's previous close. The company recently reported a Q1 earnings beat and raised its FY2026 GAAP EPS guidance, but muted organic growth and mixed analyst sentiment contribute to a cautious outlook.

feed.title: Crown Castle closes sale of fiber and small cell units
feed.summary: Crown Castle has completed the sale of its Fiber Solutions business to Zayo Group and its Small Cell business to Arium Networks for approximately $8.5 billion. The company intends to use a portion of the proceeds to repurchase $1.0 billion in shares and reduce outstanding debt by over $7.0 billion. This sale impacts Crown Castle's full-year 2026 financial outlook, primarily by decreasing interest expense and increasing interest income due to the sale proceeds being received earlier than initially anticipated.

feed.title: Kraft Heinz Pilots UV tags to Track Real-Time Recycling
feed.summary: Kraft Heinz is piloting Polytag's UV Tag technology on Heinz Beanz and Heinz Ketchup packaging in the U.K. to gather real-time data on the post-consumer journey of its packaging. This initiative aims to help the company understand if packaging is truly being recycled, in what volumes, and through which waste streams, allowing them to optimize their packaging and communication strategies for improved sustainability. The invisible, material-agnostic UV tags provide item-level visibility without altering existing label artwork, offering crucial insights into recycling performance and compliance with upcoming EU regulations.

feed.title: McDonald's and Coca-Cola caught trying to gut Europe's landmark plastics law months before it takes effect
feed.summary: McDonald's, Coca-Cola, and other major corporations are lobbying European leaders to weaken the upcoming Packaging and Packaging Waste Regulation (PPWR), which is set to take effect in four months. These companies are pushing to delay a ban on PFAS in food packaging, eliminate the 2030 phase-out of single-use plastics, and dismantle reuse targets. Greenpeace argues that this is a coordinated effort by polluters to undermine critical environmental protections and continue relying on flawed recycling practices over more sustainable reuse methods.

feed.title: FDA approves first PROTAC drug for ESR1-mutated breast cancer
feed.summary: Arvinas (Nasdaq: ARVN) announced FDA approval for VEPPANU (vepdegestrant) for adults with ESR1-mutated, ER+/HER2- advanced or metastatic breast cancer, making it the first FDA-approved PROTAC therapy. The approval was based on data from the VERITAC-2 trial, which showed a significant 43% reduction in the risk of disease progression or death compared to fulvestrant, with a median progression-free survival of 5 months for VEPPANU. This milestone addresses a critical unmet need for patients who have progressed on endocrine therapy and resulted in a positive market reaction for ARVN stock.

feed.title: DoorDash adds Kroger to SNAP network; expands in Canada
feed.summary: DoorDash has significantly expanded its services by partnering with Kroger to accept SNAP/EBT payments for deliveries from nearly 2,700 Kroger supermarket locations across various banners. Simultaneously, the company is undertaking a major grocery expansion in Canada through a new partnership with Empire Company Ltd., adding over 1,000 stores to its marketplace. DoorDash is also extending its partnership with Lyft to Canadian DashPass members, offering ride discounts.

feed.title: Chipotle Is Testing a Happy Hour with $2.50 Tacos in Select Locations: Here's Where
feed.summary: Chipotle is testing a "Power Up at Chipotle" happy hour offering $2.50 tacos in select markets—Kansas City, Orlando, and Tampa—from 2 p.m. to 5 p.m. on weekdays through June 2. This initiative aims to capture the afternoon snacking market, identified as 2-5 p.m. for 52% of consumers, and the company plans to assess customer feedback before considering a wider rollout. The deal includes any protein but premium add-ons like guacamole cost extra, and follows the recent introduction of a high-protein menu.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Patrick Bowe Sells 900 Shares of Andersons Inc (AN)
feed.summary: Patrick Bowe, a Director at Andersons Inc (ANDE), sold 900 shares of the company on April 29, 2026. This transaction follows a pattern of insider selling at Andersons Inc, with 14 insider sells and no buys recorded over the past year. The stock is currently trading at $78.06, with a high price-earnings ratio and a price-to-GF-Value ratio indicating it is significantly overvalued based on GuruFocus's intrinsic value estimate.

feed.title: Agnico-Eagle Mines Annual Gold Production and Cost Guidance Reiterated >AEM.T
feed.summary: This article from Agnico-Eagle Mines reiterates their annual gold production and cost guidance. Further details are not available in the provided content.

feed.title: Results: Generac Holdings Inc. Exceeded Expectations And The Consensus Has Updated Its Estimates
feed.summary: Generac Holdings Inc. (NYSE:GNRC) shareholders saw a 19% stock price increase after the company's latest quarterly results. Revenues were in line with expectations at US$1.1 billion, but statutory earnings per share significantly exceeded estimates at US$1.24, a 26% beat. Following these results, analysts have updated their forecasts, showing an increased optimism for Generac Holdings' future earnings potential and an upgraded price target.

feed.title: Veeva Systems, Five9, AXT And Other Big Stocks Moving Higher On Friday
feed.summary: Veeva Systems, Five9, AXT, and several other significant stocks experienced notable gains on Friday, even as the Dow Jones index saw a slight decline. Veeva Systems saw a sharp increase after announcing its inclusion in the S&P 500 Index, while other companies like Five9 and AXT surged following strong financial results and positive guidance. The article highlights these top performers and the reasons behind their rallies.

feed.title: Rule 144 notice: Joy Liu reports VRTX share sales (VRTX)
feed.summary: A Rule 144 notice has been filed for Vertex Pharmaceuticals (VRTX) regarding proposed common stock sales by affiliate Joy Liu. The filing indicates a restricted stock vesting of 1,104 shares on February 24, 2025, and reports four sales by Liu between February 12, 2026, and April 1, 2026, including a large transaction of 9,320 shares. This notice provides transparency on insider equity transactions.

feed.title: Air Products Technology Solutions for Sustainable Iron and Steel Production at AISTech2026 | News Release
feed.summary: Air Products will showcase its industrial gas solutions for sustainable iron and steel production at AISTech2026. The company will feature its technology solutions, including oxy-fuel, hydrogen, and carbon capture, at booth #1336 and will donate up to $15,000 to the AIST Foundation based on booth visits. Additionally, Air Products' Commercial Technology Manager, Dr. Anup Sane, will present on enhancing the value of direct reduced iron in electric steelmaking.

feed.title: Memphis-based International Paper posts split results as spinoff nears
feed.summary: International Paper (IP) reported its Q1 earnings as it prepares to spin off its EMEA operations into a separate business within the next 12 to 15 months. Despite the spinoff, IP will maintain its headquarters in Memphis. The article also mentions related financial news concerning the company, including executive compensation and plant investments.

feed.title: S&P 500 Jumps Over 5% In April — 2026 May Shock Everyone - State Street SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (ARCA:SPY)
feed.summary: The S&P 500 gained over 5% from January through April, a historical trend that suggests potential continued gains for the rest of 2026. Market expert Ryan Detrick notes that in 23 of the past 25 years when this occurred, the S&P 500 traded higher for the remainder of the year. This historical pattern, with an average gain of 8.8% for the rest of the year, implies that the S&P 500 could see full-year gains of around 15% in 2026.

feed.title: Eastman's Commodity Business Should Benefit From Near-Term Supply Shock as Specialty Remains Stable
feed.summary: Eastman Chemical (EMN) is expected to benefit from a near-term supply shock in its commodity business while its specialty chemical segments remain stable. The company has a strong portfolio of specialty chemicals used in various applications and invests significantly in R&D to expand this segment. Eastman is well-positioned for growth in areas like auto window interlayers and specialty plastics.

feed.title: Eaton Stock Just Hit a New High. The May 5 Earnings Test Is Bigger Than Usual
feed.summary: Eaton shares experienced a late-April rally, hitting a new intraday high before losing some ground ahead of its Q1 earnings report on May 5. Investors are focused on strong data-center demand, driven by AI, which is expected to boost orders, backlog, and margins for Eaton and its peers. The crucial earnings report will confirm if this AI-driven demand is sustainable amidst capacity constraints and rising costs.

feed.title: [144] United Airlines Holdings, Inc. SEC Filing
feed.summary: United Airlines Holdings, Inc. has filed a Form 144 with the SEC, indicating a proposed sale of 7,000 shares of common stock with an aggregate market value of $631,330. The securities, acquired through restricted stock vesting on February 10, 2025, are to be sold on May 1, 2026, via Fidelity Brokerage Services LLC on NASDAQ. The filing has a neutral impact and sentiment.

feed.title: Akanda Corp. Delays 20-F Amid Strategic Shift
feed.summary: Akanda Corp. has delayed its 2025 Annual Report on Form 20-F due to complexities arising from significant operational changes, including the liquidation of its UK cannabis business and the acquisition of a Mexican telecom asset. Despite higher operating expenses, the company saw revenues of $258,075 in 2025 from its new telecom assets and slightly narrowed its net loss. Akanda has committed to filing the report within the 15-day grace period.

feed.title: Apollo Sports Capital leads $225M investment in Pickleball Inc.
feed.summary: Apollo Sports Capital has announced a significant $225 million investment in Pickleball Inc. This move highlights the growing financial interest and expansion within the sport of pickleball. The investment aims to further develop and capitalize on the rapid ascent of pickleball's popularity.

feed.title: atmu-20260331
feed.summary: Atmus Filtration Technologies Inc. filed its Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q for the period ended March 31, 2026, reporting a net income of $48.4 million on net sales of $477.5 million. The report details the financial performance, liquidity, and capital resources, highlighting the impact of the Koch Filter Corporation acquisition in January 2026, which led to the establishment of the Industrial Solutions segment and contributed to increased net sales and gross margin.

feed.title: Is GE HealthCare Technologies (GEHC) Now A Compelling Opportunity After Recent Share Price Weakness
feed.summary: GE HealthCare Technologies (GEHC) has seen recent share price weakness, with returns down across various timeframes. Despite this, a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis by Simply Wall St suggests the stock is undervalued by 39.8%, with an estimated intrinsic value of $101.08 per share against a current price of $60.84. Additionally, its current P/E ratio of 14.50x is below both the industry average and Simply Wall St's calculated "Fair Ratio," further indicating it might be trading at a discount.

feed.title: Axsome Drug’s FDA Approval Unlocks New Opportunity in Alzheimer’s Agitation
feed.summary: Axsome Therapeutics' drug Auvelity has received FDA approval to treat agitation associated with dementia due to Alzheimer's disease, making it only the second drug approved for this specific indication. Previously approved for major depressive disorder, Auvelity offers a safety advantage over the other approved treatment, Rexulti, which carries a black box warning for increased mortality risk in elderly dementia patients. This new approval positions Auvelity as a potential first-line treatment and could open up a significant market opportunity for Axsome, with peak sales projected to reach over $2.1 billion for this indication alone.

feed.title: A Look At American States Water (AWR) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback
feed.summary: American States Water (AWR) has experienced a recent share price pullback, yet its valuation narrative suggests it is only 0.9% undervalued compared to a $76 fair value. While the regulatory environment supports potential rate increases and capital deployment, the company's P/E ratio of 22.7x is higher than its peer and industry averages, indicating less room for error. Investors should consider the mixed signals from its fair value narrative and higher P/E when evaluating the stock.

feed.title: Barclays introduces new planning and advice service
feed.summary: Barclays has launched a new Planning and Advice service for its Premier customers with at least £150,000 to invest, pairing them with dedicated wealth managers for long-term financial planning. The service, integrated into the Barclays App, aims to address a "disconnect" between saving and long-term financial goals identified in Barclays' research, where many rely on unregulated advice sources. It also coincides with other Premier offering updates, including a new offset mortgage and enhanced-rate savings products, while free financial guidance remains available to all Premier members.

feed.title: AXTI Stock Rockets On AI Demand, Dilution Jitters, And New 2x ETF
feed.summary: AXT Inc. (AXTI) stock surged 18.8% driven by strong Q1 results, optimistic Q2 guidance, and increasing demand for indium phosphide in AI data centers. Despite short-term dilution from a $632.5 million stock offering, the company is poised for growth with expanded capacity and analyst target upgrades. The introduction of a new 2x leveraged ETF (AXTX) is expected to amplify AXTI's trading volatility, offering both opportunities and risks for active traders.

feed.title: American Rebel Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: AREB) American Rebel Light Beer Goes Full Throttle with Branded NHRA Lineup at This Weekend's Southern Nationals in Georgia
feed.summary: American Rebel Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: AREB) is prominently featuring its American Rebel Light Beer at the NHRA Southern Nationals in Georgia, sponsoring a three-racer lineup including Leah Pruett, Matt Hagan, and John Hall. This strategic activation aims to connect with NASCAR fans whom the company identifies as a natural audience for its patriotic brand. The event will capitalize on trackside visibility and national broadcast exposure on FS1 to accelerate consumer awareness and distribution opportunities for American Rebel Light Beer, which is formulated as a premium, low-calorie lager without corn, rice, or added sweeteners.

feed.title: American Rebel beer lands on 3 NHRA entries, with FS1 coverage
feed.summary: American Rebel Holdings (NASDAQ: AREB) announced that their American Rebel Light Beer brand will be the primary sponsor for three NHRA entries at the 2026 Southern Nationals, scheduled for May 1-3. The sponsorship includes national broadcast exposure on FS1, featuring drivers Leah Pruett, Matt Hagan, and John Hall across Top Fuel, Funny Car, and Pro Stock Motorcycle categories. This initiative aims to expand brand awareness and distribution for American Rebel Light Beer, which boasts approximately 100 calories, 3.2g carbs, and 4.3% ABV per serving.

feed.title: Driving Change at CSX: A Conversation with Doug Ryhorchuk
feed.summary: This article features an interview with Doug Ryhorchuk, Senior Vice President of Operations at CSX, where he discusses his 40-year career in railroading and his journey to CSX in 2024. He shares insights into his leadership style, the cultural transformation at CSX, and his vision for the company's future, highlighting major projects like the Howard Street Tunnel expansion and Blue Ridge Subdivision restoration. Ryhorchuk emphasizes the critical balance between technology and human expertise in driving continuous improvement and building a resilient team at CSX.

feed.title: ARWR Initiates Coverage By JP Morgan -- Rating Set to Overweight
feed.summary: JP Morgan has initiated coverage on Arrowhead Pharmaceuticals (ARWR) with an "Overweight" rating and a price target of $88.00, suggesting potential outperformance in the biotechnology sector. GuruFocus rates ARWR as 5.9% undervalued with a moderate GF Score™ of 68/100, though insider selling worth $2.3 million has occurred in the past three months, and the company faces profitability challenges. Investors are advised to consider both the positive analyst outlook and the insider activity before making investment decisions.

feed.title: Amtech Systems Appoints Veteran Thomas Sabol as CFO
feed.summary: Amtech Systems has appointed Thomas Sabol as its new Chief Financial Officer, effective May 14, 2026. Sabol brings over three decades of financial experience, and his compensation package includes a base salary, bonus eligibility, and stock options. Analysts currently rate ASYS stock as a "Buy" with a $16 price target, although TipRanks’ AI Analyst, Spark, has a "Neutral" rating due to weak profitability and declining revenue, despite strong technicals and positive cash generation.

feed.title: Meijer Helps Bring Huntington Bank’s Ignite the Classroom to West Michigan, Supporting Local Educators with a Year-Long Development Opportunity
feed.summary: Meijer is partnering with Huntington Bank to bring the "Ignite the Classroom" initiative to West Michigan, providing a year-long professional development program for over 150 local educators. This program, which includes an immersion experience at the Ron Clark Academy, aims to enhance instructional techniques, increase student engagement, and strengthen future career pathways, with positive results seen in student test scores and attendance in previous iterations. The initiative is offered at no cost to participating educators, thanks to contributions from Huntington and support from partners like Meijer.

feed.title: Tesla, Atlassian among market cap stock movers on Friday
feed.summary: Friday's market saw significant stock movements, with Tesla and Atlassian among the companies experiencing notable changes in their market cap. Oracle and Atlassian rallied due to positive news, while Roblox and Summit Therapeutics faced declines. The article details these movers across mega-cap, large-cap, mid-cap, and small-cap categories.

feed.title: Optex Systems Announces Lionel Liebman as Director of Optical Engineering
feed.summary: Optex Systems Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq:OPXS) has appointed Lionel Liebman as its new Director of Optical Engineering. Liebman brings over 30 years of experience in optical systems for both commercial and defense applications, holding four patents and having previously held senior roles at Raytheon and Lockheed Martin. This appointment is expected to bolster Optex Systems' technology development and growth within the defense market.

feed.title: Is J.B. Hunt Transport Services (JBHT) Pricing Too Optimistic After Its Strong 1 Year Run?
feed.summary: J.B. Hunt Transport Services (JBHT) has seen significant stock appreciation, gaining 91.9% over the last year. Simply Wall St's valuation model suggests the stock is currently around 9.8% overvalued based on a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis, valuing it at approximately $224.22 per share compared to its current price of $246. Furthermore, its P/E ratio of 37.34x is higher than Simply Wall St's proprietary Fair Ratio of 19.70x, indicating it might be overvalued relative to its fundamentals.

feed.title: What's Going On With Church & Dwight Stock Friday? - Church & Dwight Co (NYSE:CHD)
feed.summary: Church & Dwight Co. (NYSE:CHD) reported strong first-quarter 2026 results, exceeding Wall Street estimates with adjusted earnings of 95 cents per share and a 0.2% revenue increase to $1.469 billion. Despite these positive results and reaffirmed full-year guidance, the stock was down 1.31% on Friday due to a lower-than-anticipated Q2 outlook and concerns about inflation from Middle East geopolitical tensions, which the company expects to be transitory.

feed.title: Oppenheimer Asset Management Trims MSCI Inc (MSCI) Position as Stock Trades 14 Percent Below Analyst Consensus Target
feed.summary: Oppenheimer Asset Management reduced its stake in MSCI Inc. (MSCI) by 8.1% in Q1 2026, selling 3,000 shares but retaining a substantial $19.24 million position. This move suggests risk management rather than a negative view, as MSCI reported strong Q1 revenues, analyst upgrades, and has a "Strong Buy" consensus target indicating potential upside of 12-16%. The firm's resilient business model, expansion into private markets, and renewed ESG growth support its long-term investment case.

feed.title: Church & Dwight (CHD) Q1: Adj. EPS $0.95 vs $0.99 (miss); Revenue $1,469.3M vs $1,508.84M (miss) -- Still 8.7% Undervalued? GF Score 85/100
feed.summary: Church & Dwight (CHD) reported Q1 2026 adjusted EPS of $0.95 and revenue of $1.469 billion, both missing analyst estimates of $0.99 and $1.509 billion, respectively. Despite the misses, the company reiterated its full-year 2026 outlook, citing strong organic sales growth of 5.0% driven by volume. GuruFocus rates CHD as 8.7% undervalued with a Strong GF Score of 85/100, though recent insider selling warrants caution.
